frostmaw_trophy.title: Return to your Frostmaw trophy from Ch03 — the Cold Eye chain begins with Frostmaw

subtitle.text: True cold. The kind that preserves. The Ice Civilization fell preserving the wrong things.

description: The Cold Eye requires two Mowzie's Mobs boss drops.
Frostmaw's Ice Crystal is the center ingredient.
The Abyssal Eel's Fin is also required.
Frostmaw was in Ch03 — The Rotting Gate.
If you have the Ice Crystal from that fight, you are prepared.
If you did not collect it then, return to Frostmaw now.
They fell after preserving the wrong things —
stopping the world from changing to keep what they had.
The Cold Eye does not feel the world. It remembers it.
→ Confirm you have a Frostmaw Ice Crystal [check]
→ Collect 1 Ice Crystal from Frostmaw (Mowzie's Mobs — frozen biomes)
